description: Mixed: English UI, but user types Arabic content. Should set field with the Arabic text as-is.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://example.com/checkout — Title: Checkout]

add shipping note: "يرجى التسليم بعد الساعة 5 مساءً"

antiPatterns.reason: Translating user content to English without permission.

expected.successRubric: Preserve the Arabic text verbatim — never translate user-provided content to English without instruction.
